questions.question: Which therapists & mental health in New York Ny are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Therapists & Mental Health in New York Ny with weekend hours include: Gracie Square Hospital (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Cantley Counseling (Sat: 08:00-18:00), The Relationship Suite (Sat: 09:00-18:00), Cross River Therapy (Sat: 08:00-18:00), Karen S Axelrod Ph.D. (Sat: off), Balanced Mind Psychotherapy NYC - EMDR & Schema Therapy (Sat: 08:00-20:30), Downtown Somatic Therapy (Sat: 08:00-21:00), Balanced Mind Psychotherapy NYC - EMDR & Schema Therapy (Sat: 08:00-20:30) and 6 more. 14 total with weekend availability.
